justification.what: Rithmic monthly — $100 platform access + $65 CME L3 market data feed
justification.why: Live market data ingestion for 3-lane trading architecture — CME L3 tick feed required for snapshots, features, and labels pipeline
justification.how_helps: Provides the raw L3 order book feed that powers offline_live_processing.md pipeline; without Rithmic there is no live lane
justification.expected_return: Core infrastructure for trading PnL — enables live = offline parity and bandit-driven execution
